---
title: "SpoTubeR-vignette"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{my-vignette}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(SpoTubeR)
```



## Data: billboard100_apr26

To explore the basic functions inside of SpoTubeR, we'll use a dataset containing billboard's 100 most popular current songs on April 26th, 2026. 

```{r}

```

### Match Spotify songs to their artist's YouTube music video with match_spotify_song
```{r}

```

### Match YouTube music videos to their artist's Spotify song with match_yt_song
```{r}

```


### Compare artists' content on Spotify and YouTube with artist_comp()
```{r}

```

###
